allocations.thesis: Confirmed risk-on; ADX 38 squeeze-long with crowded shorts paying funding, Carry confirms the receive-side. Highest-conviction with-regime trend — ride it.
allocations.falsifiable_prediction: Holds above 168.5 and makes a higher high within 2 cycles; invalidated by a 4h close below 159.

flat_verdicts.reason: Flush-short edge present but no defined-risk entry yet; armed a trigger instead of allocating budget.
